documents.purpose: Map of the Dev Kit — what WilliamOS is, current baseline, quick-start, safety boundaries
/goal and /loop for future agents — read first before any modification
Daily operator procedures — start, stop, restart, recover, use all surfaces
Fresh environment setup — Python, Node, Ollama, models, copilot init, first launch
All gate criteria and commands — backend tests, smoke, production-readiness, tag gate
Research Drop Zone guide — intake pipeline, file types, authority boundary, smoke test
Agent Dock guide — worker registry, delegation flow, evidence fields, enabling workers
Multi-runtime adapter plan — Ollama, LM Studio, llama-server, future runtimes, cloud policy
Container scope — test runner, build runner, worker sandbox, non-goals
Native packaging plan — PWA manifest/SW, Tauri tray, hard rules, implementation order
Release and tag procedures — clean tree, gate rerun, notes, tag, post-tag
Enterprise second-brain development playbook — /goal, /loop, tracks, boundaries, and next-lane map
Phase 5G decision register plan — seed register, API/UI scope, and future enforcement boundaries
Phase 5H doctrine registry plan — seed rules, API/UI scope, and future enforcement boundaries
Phase 5I work order engine plan — seed registry, API/UI scope, and future status transition boundaries
Phase 5J agent config inventory plan — redacted config discovery, API/UI scope, and future review boundaries
DevOps work order playbook — governed /goal, /loop, evidence, authority, handoff, mistake-pattern, and closure rules
Phase 5K agent skills registry plan — metadata-only capability cards, denied actions, validators, and evidence expectations
Phase 5L evidence pack generator plan — read-only handoff packet preview from repo state, validator expectations, safety posture, and next gate
Phase 5M repo state dashboard plan — read-only Control Center summary of baseline, worktree, validation history, gates, recent commits, and next action
Phase 5N work order composer plan — preview-only structured WO packet generation from objective, scope, validators, evidence, and commit rules
Phase 5O validation runbook registry plan — metadata-only approved validation recipes for Work Orders and composer previews
Phase 5P commit readiness reviewer plan — preview-only commit candidate decision support from repo state, dist status, and validation runbooks
Phase 5Q local handoff packet exporter plan — preview-only operator handoff composed from repo state, evidence, readiness, runbooks, and WOs
Phase 5R operator review inbox plan — preview-only generated review queue for handoffs, readiness, validation summaries, and next gates
Phase 5S decision gate console plan — preview-only owner decision support for pending decisions, blocked gates, allowed actions, and recommended next lane
Phase 5T operator action router preview plan — classification-only routing of pending decisions to safe next-action categories and required authority
Phase 5U authority ledger preview plan — read-only authority visibility for existing, missing, and denied authority per proposed route
Phase 5V owner decision record preview plan — draft-only owner decision record composition without writes, grants, or approvals
Phase 5W approval packet preview plan — clipboard-only approval packet composition without approvals, grants, writes, or execution
Phase 5X goal registry preview plan — metadata-only governed goal catalog without goal creation, persistence, or execution
Phase 5Y loop registry preview plan — metadata-only governed loop catalog without loop start, scheduling, execution, or state writes
Phase 5Z goal/loop readiness reviewer plan — preview-only owner-review readiness decision support without approval or execution
Phase 6A goal command preview hardening plan — non-executing /goal request classifier without goal creation, scheduling, or queue mutation
Phase 6B loop command preview hardening plan — non-executing /loop request classifier without loop start, scheduling, autonomous continuation, or MCP activation
Phase 6C governed goal/loop console plan — preview-only integrated decision support across goal, loop, readiness, authority, approval, and route surfaces
This file — machine-readable Dev Kit manifest

clean_tree.pass_condition: no modified or untracked files in release scope

boundaries.phase_6: BLOCKED — do not implement proactive intelligence until Bill explicitly authorizes
boundaries.external_worker_writes: FORBIDDEN — external workers may propose only; no write/commit/promote authority
boundaries.cloud_runtime: DISABLED — WilliamOS must never silently fall back to a cloud runtime
boundaries.auto_commit: FORBIDDEN — automatic commits without reviewed approval are not permitted
boundaries.auto_canon: FORBIDDEN — automatic canon promotion without reviewed approval is not permitted
boundaries.dirty_tree_tag: FORBIDDEN — no tag may be created from a dirty tree
boundaries.safety_gate_weakening: FORBIDDEN — safety.check_command and command_runner boundaries must not be weakened
boundaries.remote_push: FORBIDDEN — no remote push or cloud sync
